status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
status.name: Open

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description:
In some scenarios, applications will request nonexistent resource name in this cluster, such as nonexistent hosts or racks.

Obviously, we should filter or degrade these invaild resource requests actively.

*This is especially effective when HDFS and Yarn are deployed on different nodes, and the scheduling throughput of one of our clusters has improved by {color:#ff0000}5X{color}.*

fields.summary: Job hangs when a job requests a resource that its queue does not have

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.summary: Provide options to skip adding resource request for data-local and rack-local respectively

status.description: A patch for this issue has been uploaded to JIRA by a contributor.
status.name: Patch Available

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement
